steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$-4{x}^{2}-7x=-36$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $\frac{9}{4}$.

steps.title: Move everything to one side
steps.content:
Start with $-4x^2-7x=-36$. Add $36$ to both sides, then multiply by $-1$ to make factoring easier:
$$-4x^2-7x+36=0$$
$$4x^2+7x-36=0$$
